summary: Estonia operates one of the world's most advanced digital identity systems. Every citizen and resident holds a mandatory national ID card with a chip enabling cryptographic authentication and digital signatures. The system supports e-Residency, allowing non-residents to establish a trusted digital identity for accessing Estonian e-services. The ID card is used for voting, healthcare access, banking, tax filing, and over 99% of government services.
notes: Estonia's ID card infrastructure relies on public key infrastructure (PKI) managed by SK ID Solutions. Mobile-ID and Smart-ID provide alternative digital identity verification methods. The e-Residency programme has enrolled over 100,000 e-residents from 170+ countries.
